summary: Tested Gurukul School of Music site end-to-end. Backend: all 5 pytest cases pass (health, create full/minimal booking, 422 validation, list with latest-first ordering, _id leak check). Frontend: all 10 site sections render, navbar smooth-scroll works, hero CTA scrolls to contact, gallery year tabs (2024/2025/2026) switch, FAQ accordion expands, testimonial prev/next work, empty form shows toast error and blocks POST, full form submit POSTs to /api/demo-bookings and opens new tab with the user's name in URL.

issues: After successful submit a green success toast briefly overlaps the top navbar — minor; auto-dismisses.

critical_code_review_comments: Contact.jsx opens WhatsApp via https://wa.me/91<num>; WhatsApp itself redirects to api.whatsapp.com/send — expected behavior, name/phone propagate correctly.
server.py stores created_at as ISO string then parses back on GET — works, but consider storing as native BSON datetime to avoid mixed-type handling.
POST /api/demo-bookings returns 200; consider 201 Created for resource creation semantics (non-blocking).
seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_-prefixed demo bookings in MongoDB via API during tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_gurukul_api.py and run via pytest from /app. UI tested against external REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. WhatsApp wa.me link redirects to api.whatsapp.com — assert by presence of phone/name in the new-tab URL rather than wa.me host.
